MrBigBets

1/19 nba plays

Pistons -3 -110 2u
Michael Porter Jr U34.5 PRA -115 1u

Top 2 teams in the east meeting tonight. Pistons have the chance to establish themselves as the true number 1 team in the east tonight. Both teams are coming off blowout wins but I’m rolling with the pistons at home

MPJ’s been one of my favorite guys to go to this year for overs but tonight I’m going with the under. Phoenix plays really well defensively and both these teams play slow. This should be a low scoring defensive game which should limit MPJ’s opportunities tonight
